scripts.build: echo 'Compiling lib-medium-11...' && sleep .7 && echo 'Generating types...' && sleep 0.2 && echo 'lib-medium-11 ready!' && mkdir -p dist && date > dist/.stamp
scripts.dev: echo 'lib-medium-11 watching...' && while true; do sleep 2; echo '[lib-medium-11] rebuilt in 45ms'; done
scripts.test: echo 'Running lib-medium-11 tests...' && sleep .2 && echo '  Suite: unit - 5 passed' && echo '  Suite: integration - 3 passed'
